scope_decision.reason: User approved recovery of Experiment 3 and exactly one additional experiment instead of the originally planned ten.

rules.required_progression: Each run must pass hard gates and improve either score or a measurable efficiency/quality dimension.

experiments.name: RoomReady
architecture_improvements: live demos require two real mutations and two distinct UI states
capture actions and state digests are written to capture_report.json
fallback video cannot pass a Codex delivery run
contract IDs are conserved exactly after MODEL
OBSERVE proof references are machine-resolvable
Night must retain evidence-backed run memory for every agent
resume repair budgets and manifests reconstruct from append-only logs
bundles allowlist declared artifacts and advertise an honest HTTP launch

experiments.name: StockSignal
architecture_improvements: semantic browser-test failures cannot pass on exit code zero
browser acceptance requires a verified success receipt
resume passes prior gate findings and current command evidence back to agents
future apps require canonical numeric display, plain-language formulas, documented browser prerequisites, and full contract boundary tests
demo visuals are duration-synchronized to narration and use smaller overlays
bundle rebuilds are locked, staged, byte-materialized, exact-scope verified, and File-Provider-safe

experiments.name: PolicyProof
architecture_improvements: every receiver assessment is durably written before repair starts
a rejected handoff keeps reward 0 after successful repair while delivery may continue
canonical reward and shadow rows use the latest current-artifact lineage
the pre-Night gate rejects stale producer digests, evidence, shadows, or artifact ancestry
the invalid sequence-4 commit is preserved as superseded and live inference was restored to verified sequence 3

experiments.name: CoverageCanvas
architecture_improvements: a manually corrected failed EXECUTE workspace starts a new digest-proven repair epoch on resume
CDP readiness probes normalize object results before return-by-value
browser proof rejects transparent focus surfaces and covers every distinct reset transition
inserted interfaces receive deterministic logical focus and the harness proves application-driven focus
browser startup failures terminate children before the outer caller receives a handle
script-driven HTTP classification has no same-origin static-resource false-negative
demo observations can use stable accessible names instead of text-node whitespace
